title: ARGUS Agent Payload
description: Payload sent by all agents (Linux, macOS, Windows) to the backend API.

os_version.description: Full OS version string. Example: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS, macOS 14.5, Windows 11 Pro

scanned_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the scan ran. Example: 2025-07-05T14:30:00Z

uptime_seconds.description: System uptime in seconds at time of scan.

ip_address.description: Internal IP address of the machine. Example: 192.168.1.42

findings.description: List of detected Shadow AI findings. Empty array if nothing found.

name.description: Specific tool name. Example: ollama, cursor, mcp_config

status.description: Whether the tool was detected or confirmed absent.

evidence.description: Human-readable evidence string shown on the dashboard. Example: Port 11434 open (PID 12345)

pid.description: Process ID of the detected tool (if applicable).

port.description: Network port of the detected tool (if applicable).

path.description: File path of the detected config or directory (if applicable).

user.description: Username who owns the process or file.

detected_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this specific finding was detected.
